title: Medical Packages for Seniors (Above 45)
content: Patients who are older than 45 years are eligible to purchase the Senior Package. This package is tailored to age-related health monitoring and preventative care.

title: Medical Packages for Women (Above 45)
content: Female patients who are older than 45 years are eligible to purchase the Premium Package. This package offers advanced screenings and health assessments specifically for women in the senior demographic.

title: Medical Packages for Adolescents and Young Adults
content: The medical system offers specific packages for younger patients: The Adolescent Package is for those below 20 years old. The Under30 Package is for patients from 20 to 30 years old, and the Middle Age Package is for those between 31 and 45.

title: Medical Packages Pricing Structure
content: All medical packages—including the Adolescent, Under30, Middle Age, Senior, and Premium Packages—are priced at a flat rate of $1000 per package. This simplified pricing ensures accessibility for all demographic groups.
